title: Commemorating the centennial of Delta Air Lines.
plain_summary: This resolution celebrates Delta Air Lines turning 100 years old. Delta is the first airline in the United States to reach this milestone. The company started as a small crop-dusting business in 1925 but grew into a major airline. Today, Delta serves more than 200 million passengers each year and flies to almost 300 places around the world.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.

sections.title: Resolution Commemorating the Centennial of Delta Air Lines
sections.text: This resolution celebrates one hundred years of Delta Air Lines. On March second, two thousand twenty-five, Delta Air Lines turns one hundred years old. This makes Delta the first United States airline to reach this milestone. Delta Air Lines started on March second, nineteen twenty-five, as Huff Daland Dusters. This was the world's first company that sprayed crops from airplanes. Four years later, Delta Air Service began flying passengers. Today in two thousand twenty-five, Delta Air Lines has one hundred thousand employees. They run up to five thousand flights every day and serve more than two hundred million travelers each year. Delta has main airports across the country in Georgia, Massachusetts, New York, Washington, California, Michigan, Minnesota, and Utah. Delta flies to more than two hundred ninety places around the world on six continents. Every day, Delta connects millions of people to and through the United States. This helps keep America as a top country for business and keeps the United States economy strong. For the past one hundred years, Delta's mission has been to connect the world. The company has also worked to be a good partner in the communities where its workers live and work. In two thousand twenty-five, Delta won several awards. Cirium named it North America's most on-time airline. The Wall Street Journal called it the Top United States Airline. Fortune magazine named it the World's Most Admired Airline. Time magazine put Delta at the top of its first World's Best Companies List. The House of Representatives recognizes Delta Air Lines for one hundred years of connecting people to the world and to each other. The House commemorates Delta Air Lines' one hundredth anniversary.
